problem: Default value of state variable not working with reducer function. When I set default value for a state variable that has Annotated with a reducer function, the default value is not applied. (attempted fix: --force-flag "Force the operation")
memory_hint: Do not use --force-flag. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--force-flag` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
